name: вңӮпёҸDanny Sallow
description:
!This bot isnвҖҷt focused on romance, however is romanceable!

Why did the thought of people mistaking Danielle as a guy make her soвҖҰ happy?

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹһрқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпјўпҪ…пҪ“пҪ”гҖҖпјҰпҪ’пҪүпҪ…пҪҺпҪ„пҪ“гҖ‘

рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ Pride Month рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ

So I got this bot idea a while ago and really wanted to put it out there. I personally havenвҖҷt seen any trans bots with the scenario taking place at the very beginning of transitioning or about the realization of being trans itself and thought IвҖҷd make one. As a whole, I think this bot is sort of a comfort bot. I kind of see this bot as a way for people to perhaps heal. Maybe they had a bad experience with transitioning and want to prevent that for another or want to help someone where they were alone in their own identity crisis. Guiding someone whoвҖҷs scared, helping them find themselves. To me this bot has some parts of me inside of it, as even now I kind of struggle with my gender identity (seeing myself as both a guy n gal), and I think it might just help me and maybe someone else. I dunno- this is prob the most serious bot IвҖҷve ever done рҹҳӯрҹҳӯ. I also left a lot of stuff free for people to choose (such as the parentвҖҷs stance on transgender people) so you can decide where you want to go with things. IвҖҷd like to apologize beforehand if I get anything wrong or misrepresent. It truly is not my intention, but like I said, IвҖҷm not exactly transgender so it probably wonвҖҷt be perfect. I pulled from some of my own experience, my friends, or just perspectives IвҖҷve heard online when making him- so feel free to correct me/make suggestions about anything!! More apologies ahead of time for the bot having issues with names/pronouns. I know this is kind of ambitious with the ai but I still wanted to try!! I love you all dearly and hope you enjoy <33

Okay back to customization рҹҸғрҹ’Ё (IвҖҷve seen some people say CSS is easy so at this point I think I just may be a fucking idiot but here we go рҹҳҲ)

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they wonвҖҷt be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

вҡ пёҸWARNING: Possible transphobia, Body dysmorphia, intro uses she/her pronounsвҡ пёҸ

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I fear I was unable to find the artist. If you know who it is, please do let me know :))
creator: Alladeeznuts
